const int ledR = 2;
const int ledG = 3;
const int ledB = 4;
const int ledY = 5;

void setup() {
  pinMode(ledR, OUTPUT);
  pinMode(ledG, OUTPUT);
  pinMode(ledB, OUTPUT);
  pinMode(ledY, OUTPUT);

  Serial.begin(9600);
}
void blinkLED(int ledPin, int delayTime) {
  digitalWrite(ledPin, HIGH);
  delay(delayTime);
  digitalWrite(ledPin, LOW);
  delay(delayTime);
}

void loop() {
  const char* sequence =
    "";

  for (int i = 0; sequence[i] != '\0'; i++) {
    char base = toupper(sequence[i]);

    switch (base) {
      case 'A':
        blinkLED(ledR, 200);
        break;
      case 'T':
        blinkLED(ledG, 200);
        break;
      case 'U':
        blinkLED(ledG, 200);
        break;
      case 'G':
        blinkLED(ledB, 200);
        break;
      case 'C':
        blinkLED(ledY, 200);
        break;
      default:
        break;
    }
  }

  delay(1000);
}

int main() {
  init(); 
  setup();
  loop();

  return 0;
}
